author: J. Murphy (Superintendent)
raw_notes: Thu morning 58F clear PM 71F clear no rain wind light. 8 trades on site total ~58 ppl. concrete crew 16 on L7 deck cylinders stripped 7-day breaks 4280psi 4310psi 4205psi all pass. steel erector continued L6 erection back on schedule completed L6 hauled to L7 by EOS. envelope L8 west finished insulation 4 PM. mason finished SS-2 east jamb. mep rough-in progressing L4 plumbing top-out, no inspection failures. crane TC-1 7.2 hrs TC-2 6.5 hrs. no incidents no near miss. delivery: 2 trucks doors+frames stair shafts SS-1 SS-3 morning. one truck rebar 18 tons. issue: hardware schedule HW-12 hinge 12 weeks lead RFI in. tomorrow plan: L8 grouting NW jamb 7am, L7 columns reinforcing start, L6 steel inspection by independent UT inspector 10am. weather forecast 5/22 clear 75F.

author: J. Murphy (Superintendent)
raw_notes: Fri AM 62F sun PM 76F sun no precip. crews concrete 14 steel 6 mason 8 env 6 mep 6 gc 7. L7 columns reinforcing in progress C-27 thru C-34 80% by EOS. L8 NW jamb grout placed 9am-1130 reconsolidated within 25 min cleanouts plugged. L6 UT inspection passed 9 of 10 welds, one indication at CL-209 column splice rejected, weld to be removed and replaced Monday by qualified welder. envelope crew moved to L9 north elevation insulation start. no incidents. deliveries: rebar 20 tons, masonry block 1 truck. forecast 5/23 28F overnight may impact welding RFI-0185 still pending response. risk: hinge HW-12 lead-time still affecting door schedule, may delay TCO by 1-2 weeks. tomorrow saturday plan: cylinder breaks at lab 7-day for L7 deck.
